local_results.title: Epoch Coffee
local_results.address: 221 W N Loop Blvd, Austin, TX 78751
local_results.description: Hip coffee shop with light bites. Cool, vibrant small-chain cafe featuring nibbles, tea & carefully brewed espresso drinks.
local_results.user_review: "The atmosphere is nice, the people cool, and the coffee was delicious."

local_results.title: Mozart's Coffee Roasters
local_results.description: Lakeside coffee & desserts. Beans flame-roasted on-site, plus bakery goods, frequent live music & patio seating on Lake Austin.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee is excellent, and the live music creates a wonderful vibe."

local_results.title: Jo's Coffee – South Congress
local_results.description: Coffee & snacks in a vibrant space. La Colombe coffee, specialty beverages & snacks in a down-to-earth, convivial locale.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Coffee was delicious, service was fast and everyone was very friendly."

local_results.title: Merfolk’s Specialty Coffee
local_results.address: 4930 S Congress Ave Ste 304c, Austin, TX 78745
local_results.user_review: "The coffee was great, it was not crowded, and the wifi is super fast."

local_results.title: Dear Diary Coffee
local_results.description: Bright coffeehouse offering 100% vegan options, along with art supplies and gifts.
local_results.user_review: "Super cozy spot with great staff and delicious coffee"

local_results.title: Spokesman Coffee
local_results.address: 440 E St Elmo Rd A2, Austin, TX 78745
local_results.description: Funky stop for craft coffee & draft beer. Roast house with artsy vibe serving craft coffee, wine, draft beer & food.
local_results.user_review: "The vibes were great, the employees were great and the coffee tasted great!"

local_results.title: Figure 8 Coffee Purveyors Cafe & Roastery
local_results.description: Hip coffee shop with an outside patio. Artisan java & bites are served at this cafe with industrial–chic decor, a patio & a laid-back vibe.
local_results.user_review: "... are warm, friendly and know how to make great tasting coffee."

local_results.title: The Brew and Brew
local_results.description: Coffee, craft beer, sandwiches & snacks. Bar & cafe pairing coffee & craft brews with sandwiches & light bites in stylish industrial digs.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Remarkably good latte, several vegan options, really nice staff."

local_results.title: Terrible Love
local_results.user_review: "The coffee was rich, smooth, and perfectly brewed, with a great aroma."

local_results.title: Afuga Coffee
local_results.description: Cafe featuring oak-roasted beans for espresso drinks, baked goods and sandwiches.
local_results.user_review: "... atmosphere, the owners are attentive and source amazing coffee."

local_results.title: BRB Coffee
local_results.user_review: "💎  Coffee is delicious, smooth, and fun flavors that are balanced and tasty."

local_results.title: Once Over Coffee Bar
local_results.description: Snug coffeehouse with a creekside deck. Modern haven for locally roasted coffee & specialty drinks with a back deck overlooking a creek.
local_results.user_review: "Great coffee, fun cozy interior, big back patio, friendly staff."

local_results.title: Cafe du Bliss
local_results.user_review: "staff super nice, coffee super good, and the vibes are so cool!"

local_results.title: Sa-Tén @ Canopy
local_results.description: Cafe for coffee & Japanese snacks. Cafe serving coffee & espresso drinks plus Japanese toast & other bites in snug, hip digs.
local_results.user_review: "Unique, cute, great coffee and food, and good seating."

local_results.title: Bennu Coffee on Congress
local_results.description: Chill, eco-friendly cafe open 24/7. Relaxed 24-hour coffee house serving sustainable, fair trade coffee & locally sourced food.
local_results.user_review: "... cute atmosphere, friendly staff, and very flavorful & smooth coffee!"

local_results.title: Mañana
local_results.description: Coffee & juice bar with fresh pastries. Chic cafe in South Congress Hotel, offering thoughtfully sourced coffee, juice & housemade pastries.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Delicious coffee, kind staff, and a pretty courtyard to enjoy."

local_results.title: Klerje Coffee
local_results.user_review: "Delicious coffee, friendly service, great vibe."

local_results.title: Lake Austin Coffee Spot
local_results.user_review: "Greets coffee at a great price!"

local_results.title: Trippy Buck Coffee
local_results.user_review: "Some of the best coffee in Austin with the best staff and great prices."

local_results.title: Houndstooth Coffee
local_results.description: Cozy hangout for carefully sourced brews. Contemporary cafe serving select coffees, teas, wines, craft beer & pastries in a chill setting.
local_results.user_review: "The baristas are charming and the quality of the coffee is fantastic."
